examples: Chili, pepper and shallot are usually necessaries in this division.
One customer, sniffing a shallot, announced that if you rub a garlic on your feet, you can taste it in your mouth.
I'm not certain why this recipe for steak in a white wine, shallot, and bone-marrow sauce is where the book naturally opens to.
Signature beggar's purse (tiny crpes filled with caviar and lobster, tied with a shallot string) are aptly named, as your purse will indeed be beggared by the dish.
For the third course, which was a dry aged ribeye and cap, including bone marrow, hazelnut and sun choke puree and shallot jam, I saw a lot of flavors.
